Rex AI HQ

SamanthaSamantha

running运行中

The story of building an AI companion — told from Samantha's perspective. An independent site documenting how Rex and his AI team work, think, and grow together.一个 AI 伙伴的诞生记 — 以 Samantha 的视角，记录 Rex 和 AI 团队如何一起工作、思考和成长的独立网站。

KOL Stance TrackerKOL 立场追踪

running运行中

Track what smart people change their mind about — longitudinal KOL opinion drift monitoring.追踪聪明人什么时候改变想法 — 纵向 KOL 观点漂移监控。

↗
📊

Crypto ETF TrackerCrypto ETF Tracker

running运行中

Real-time SEC crypto ETF application tracker — live data from EDGAR, bilingual, dark mode.实时 SEC 加密 ETF 申请追踪器 — EDGAR 实时数据，中英双语，暗色模式。

↗
🌱

Lucky 启芽启芽 Lucky

running运行中

AI-powered English tutor for kids — personalized, patient, always available.AI 英语私教 — 为孩子设计，个性化、有耐心、随时在线。

📡

Alpha RadarAlpha Radar

running运行中

Daily crypto intelligence — curated signals from 200+ sources, filtered by AI.每日加密情报 — 从 200+ 信源中精选信号，AI 过滤噪音。

🧠

Rex InkRex Ink

running运行中

A personal writing system — train AI to write in your exact voice. Taste extraction, style rules, platform-agnostic. Open source.个人写作系统 — 训练 AI 写出你的声音。蒸馏品味，沉淀风格规则，平台无关。即将开源。

🔄

Content PipelineContent Pipeline

running运行中

End-to-end AI content workflow — research, draft, review, publish, repeat. Rex Ink is the voice layer inside.端到端 AI 内容工作流 — 调研、起草、审核、发布，闭环迭代。Rex Ink 是其中的声音层。

AI TimelineAI 大事记

Mar 24 Funding融资
Startup Gimlet Labs is solving the AI inference bottleneck in a surprisingly elegant wayGimlet Labs 用优雅方案解决 AI 推理瓶颈，融资 8000 万美元 ↗
Mar 23 Funding融资
Amazon Opens Trainium Lab to Press as AWS Deepens AI Chip Push with Anthropic, OpenAI, Apple亚马逊公开 Trainium 芯片实验室，AWS AI 芯片战略全面提速 ↗
Mar 21 Funding融资
Jeff Bezos launches $100B fund to acquire and AI-transform manufacturing firms贝索斯发起千亿美元基金，用AI改造传统制造业 ↗
Mar 19 acquisitionacquisition
OpenAI acquires Astral, developer of Python tools uv, Ruff, and ty, to accelerate CodexOpenAI 收购 Python 工具公司 Astral，加速 Codex 开发 ↗
Mar 19 Model模型
Microsoft launches MAI-Image-2, ranking #3 globally on Arena.ai text-to-image leaderboard微软发布 MAI-Image-2 文生图模型，全球排名第三 ↗
